user_query: I recently started trading cryptocurrencies and I'm looking for real-time pricing information. Can you fetch the Shrimpy supported exchange assets for Kucoin and their pricing information? Also, I'd like to know the 24-hour trading data for quantaex.com. Additionally, could you provide me with a random quote to inspire my trading decisions?

TaskList.description: Fetch the supported exchange assets for Kucoin from Shrimpy along with their pricing information.
Get the 24-hour trading data for the exchange quantaex.com.
Retrieve a random quote that can inspire trading decisions.
